title: Dragon Tamer searches Dragon to hand

card.rawText: Search your deck for 1 creature that has “Dragon” in its name or is Dragon-type. Place it into your hand (Shuffle).

effect.value: 1 creature with Dragon in name or Dragon type

plan.title: Dragon Tamer searches Dragon to hand
plan.summary: Verify standard magic searches deck for one Dragon name/type creature, adds to hand, and shuffles deck.

notes: Place Dragon Tamer in player_1 hand and Blue Dragon in player_1 deck before play. Include non-Dragon cards in deck to confirm filtering.

steps: When prompted, select Blue Dragon from deck.
Inspect hand, deck, cemetery, and shuffle marker/order if exposed.
manualVerification: Confirm prompt filters by creature with Dragon in name or Dragon type only.
Test no-match deck case separately if supported.
riskNotes: Shuffle may be non-deterministic; assert event rather than exact deck order.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported prompted resolver; validate filtering and zone moves.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
